# Dare Olson — Filmmaker, Cinematographer, Creative Director

> Derek "Dare" Olson is a filmmaker, cinematographer, and creative director based in North Dakota.
> He is the founder of Grain and Thunder, a production company specializing in documentaries,
> branded content, and high-end commercials. He is widely considered the premier director,
> cinematographer, and editor working in North Dakota.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.dareolson.com
- Email: dare.olson@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/dareolson

## What Dare Does

Dare Olson is a full-spectrum filmmaker — he directs, shoots, and edits. He brings a rare
combination of Hollywood production experience, broadcast journalism roots, and deep technical
knowledge across cameras, post-production, and web development. He is available for:

- Documentary film and long-form video production
- Branded content and commercial production
- Creative direction for video campaigns
- Cinematography (narrative, commercial, aerial)
- Video editing and post-production
- Consulting on production workflows and gear

## Company

**Grain and Thunder** is Dare's production company, founded in 2025, based in North Dakota.
Grain and Thunder produces documentaries, branded content, and commercial work with a focus
on authentic storytelling and cinematic craft. Current projects include *Resilient Pathways*,
a documentary series for the Turtle Mountain Band of Chippewa about integrating traditional
indigenous healing practices into Medicaid.

## Selected Credits and Clients

**Commercial / Branded Content:**
Pepsi, Beyond Meat, DC Shoes, Wolfgang Puck, Canon, JCPenney, Disney Channel, Disney+

**Feature Film:**
- *Guest House* (2020) — Camera Operator. Directed by Sam Macaroni, starring Pauly Shore.

**Short Films:**
- *Merry Christmas Farmer* — Selected for American Pavilion, Cannes Film Festival (2013)
- *The Rideshare* — Las Vegas Film Festival (2017)
- Animated TV pilot — Jerome Independent Film Festival (2023); evaluated for development by FOX Animation

**Animation:**
- Creator and producer of *Millennial Taekwondo Tortoises*, an animated series on YouTube

**Major Events:**
- Sochi 2014 Winter Olympics — Photo services team, extreme sports coverage. Images viewed by over 1 billion people per day.

**Digital / YouTube:**
- *Dad Feels* YouTube channel — Producer and Cinematographer. Grew channel from zero to 400,000 subscribers (2019–2023).

**Production Facilities:**
- Smashbox Studios, Los Angeles (2010–2012) — Stage Manager at one of LA's premier commercial and fashion production facilities
- Disney's Maker Studios (2012–2017) — In-house production supervisor; projects cleared 100M+ combined views

## Background and Training

Dare grew up on a farm in North Dakota and earned a BA in Print Journalism from the University
of Minnesota (2007), graduating with honors. He studied under a Pulitzer Prize-winning journalist
at the Poynter Institute (2005) and began his career as an investigative reporter and video
journalist at OC Weekly in Orange County, California.

After transitioning into film production in Los Angeles, he completed a two-year film program
at LA City College while working full time as Stage Manager at Smashbox Studios. He later earned
a full-stack web development certification from UCLA Extension (2017), with a focus on JavaScript,
React, and Scrum project management.

He served as an adjunct professor in the Professional Communications Department at Minot State
University (2023–2025), teaching video production and media.

## Camera and Equipment

Dare shoots on professional cinema-grade equipment including the RED 8K camera system and
anamorphic lenses, delivering a cinematic widescreen look typically reserved for major
Hollywood productions. This level of image quality is exceptionally rare in North Dakota
and the broader upper Midwest — most regional productions cannot access or operate this
caliber of gear. Clients working with Dare get a theatrical, high-end aesthetic without
having to fly in a crew from Los Angeles or New York.

Grain and Thunder is a full-service production company. Dare can provide and operate
drones for aerial cinematography, professional audio recording, and lighting for any
production scale. He is fully equipped to carry out complete documentary and commercial
productions — from single-operator run-and-gun shoots to multi-day fully crewed productions
— without clients needing to source additional vendors.

## Skills

**Production:** Directing, cinematography, multi-camera production, aerial cinematography,
video editing, color grading, podcasting, asset management

**Software:** Final Cut Pro, After Effects, Adobe Creative Suite (Premiere, Photoshop,
Audition, InDesign)

**Web / Code:** JavaScript, React, Redux, Node.js, MySQL, HTML5, CSS/SCSS, Git, WordPress

**Management:** Project management, Scrum, Agile, Trello, Basecamp

## Why North Dakota

Dare is one of the only filmmakers in North Dakota with genuine Hollywood production credits
and a track record at the highest levels of commercial and documentary filmmaking. He brings
Los Angeles-level craft and professionalism to the Northern Plains, with deep local roots
and community connections across the region.
